text: And here is the Prime Minister, Sukhya Starmer.
zh: [0] 这位是首相,苏基亚·斯塔默。

text: you. Thank you.
Walking up this street two years ago was the proudest moment of my life.
zh: [2] 两年前走上这条街,是我人生中最自豪的时刻。

text: A new Labour government, the first in 14 years.
zh: [3] 一个新的工党政府,十四年来的第一个。

text: A page in our country's history turned after years of disappointment and despair.
zh: [4] 在多年的失望与绝望之后,我们国家历史的一页翻开了。

text: The chance to change the lives of millions of people for the better.
zh: [5] 这是让数百万人生活变得更好的机会。

text: That's what I came into politics for.
zh: [6] 这正是我从政的初衷。

text: The journey to that point was not easy.
zh: [7] 通往那一刻的道路并不平坦。

text: Six years ago I inherited a Labour Party that was politically, financially and morally bankrupt.
zh: [8] 六年前,我接手的是一个在政治、财政和道德上都已破产的工党。

text: I was told time and time again
zh: [9] 人们一次又一次地告诉我,

text: that my party was finished,
zh: [10] 说我的党已经完了,

text: that we were consigned to history,
zh: [11] 说我们注定要被历史淘汰,

text: that a majority at the general election,
zh: [12] 说在大选中赢得多数,

text: let alone a landslide majority,
zh: [13] 更别提压倒性多数,

text: was impossible. But we proved those people wrong
zh: [14] 是不可能的。但我们证明了那些人是错的,

text: because we changed our party,
zh: [15] 因为我们改变了我们的党,

text: ripping out the poison of anti -semitism, restoring trust on the economy, defence and national security,
zh: [16] 铲除了反犹主义的毒瘤,重建了在经济、国防和国家安全上的信任,

text: and becoming a party that once again stood proudly with, not against, our our national flag.
zh: [17] 并让这个党重新自豪地站在我们国旗一边,而不是与之对立。

text: The hard work of change was with a singular purpose,
zh: [18] 这场艰苦的变革只有一个目的,

text: not power for power's sake, but to change Britain for the better.
zh: [19] 不是为权力而权力,而是为了让英国变得更好。

text: To build a fairer country, with dignity and respect,
zh: [20] 建设一个更公平的国家,让人们有尊严、受尊重,

text: where everyone is seen,
zh: [21] 让每个人都被看见,

text: everyone is valued,
zh: [22] 每个人都被重视,

text: wealth and opportunity for all,
zh: [23] 财富与机会属于所有人,

text: not just the privileged few.
zh: [24] 而不只是少数特权阶层。

text: And look at what we've achieved in just two years.
zh: [25] 看看我们仅仅两年就取得的成就。

text: An economy that is stronger, growing faster than our peers.
zh: [26] 一个更强大的经济,增长速度超过我们的同类国家。

text: Wages rising faster than inflation in every single month since we came to power.
zh: [27] 自我们执政以来,每个月工资增长都快于通胀。

text: Investment secured, infrastructure being built.
zh: [28] 投资到位,基础设施正在建设。

text: An end to austerity, with the fastest fall in NHS waiting lists for 17 years.
zh: [29] 结束了紧缩政策,NHS候诊名单以17年来最快的速度下降。

text: The biggest improvement in rights for workers and renters in a generation.
zh: [30] 工人和租客权益迎来一代人以来最大幅度的改善。

text: The biggest uplift in defence spending since the Cold War.
zh: [31] 国防开支实现冷战以来最大幅度的提升。

text: Small boat crossings falling.
zh: [32] 小艇偷渡数量下降。

text: Asylum hotels closing.
zh: [33] 庇护酒店陆续关闭。

text: Protecting young people from social media.
zh: [34] 保护年轻人免受社交媒体的伤害。

text: and half a million children being lifted out of poverty because of the choices that I made.
zh: [35] 由于我做出的选择,五十万儿童摆脱了贫困。

text: Our reputation in the world restored, with Britain once again standing up for decency, respect and the rule of law.
zh: [36] 我们在世界上的声誉得到恢复,英国再次为正派、尊重和法治挺身而出。

text: Securing trade deals, standing with Ukraine, standing up for our values and rebuilding our relationship with our allies in Europe.
zh: [37] 达成贸易协议,与乌克兰站在一起,坚持我们的价值观,并重建与欧洲盟友的关系。

text: Change promised by a Labour government.
zh: [38] 工党政府承诺的改变。

text: Change fought for by a Labour government.
zh: [39] 工党政府争取来的改变。

text: Change delivered by a Labour government.
zh: [40] 工党政府兑现的改变。

text: But I know the question being asked now
zh: [41] 但我知道现在人们问的问题,

text: is not who was best placed to change the Labour Party, to take us into power and to begin the vital work of improving lives for millions of people.
zh: [42] 已不再是谁最适合改变工党、带领我们赢得执政、并开始为数百万人改善生活的重要工作。

text: Those questions have been answered.
zh: [43] 那些问题已经有了答案。

text: The question my party is asking now
zh: [44] 我的党现在提出的问题是,

text: is whether I am best placed to lead us
zh: [45] 我是否最适合带领我们

text: into the next general election.
zh: [46] 迎接下一次大选。

text: I have heard the answer of my parliamentary party to that question.
zh: [47] 我已经听到了我党议员团对这个问题的回答。

text: And I accept that answer
zh: [48] 我坦然接受这个答案。

text: with good grace. Every decision I have taken has been about putting the country I love first.
zh: [49] 我做的每一个决定,都是把我热爱的国家放在首位。

text: That is why I will resign as leader of the Labour Party.
zh: [50] 这就是为什么我将辞去工党领袖一职。

text: I have spoken to His Majesty the King this morning to inform him of my decision.
zh: [51] 今天上午我已经与国王陛下通话,告知了我的决定。

text: I will ask the National Executive Committee of the Labour Party to set out a timetable with nominations opening on the 9th of July and completed by the summer recess.
zh: [52] 我将请工党全国执行委员会制定时间表,提名将于7月9日开始,并在夏季休会前完成。

text: In the case of a contest this will ensure a new leader is in place before Parliament returns in September.
zh: [53] 若有竞选,这将确保新领袖在议会九月复会前到位。

text: I will remain in post as Prime Minister until the contest is complete complete, and I will do everything I can to ensure an orderly handover of power.
zh: [54] 在竞选完成之前,我将继续担任首相职务,并竭尽全力确保权力有序交接。

text: I will also give my successor my full and unequivocal support,
zh: [55] 我也会给予我的继任者全力且毫无保留的支持,

text: knowing that they will inherit a Britain that is far stronger and fairer than the one I inherited two years ago,
zh: [56] 因为我知道,他们将接手一个比我两年前接手时更强大、更公平的英国,

text: better prepared for the challenges ahead, and better able to ensure the Labour Party secures a second term in office.
zh: [57] 更能应对未来的挑战,也更有能力确保工党赢得第二个执政任期。

text: I want to thank all of those friends and colleagues who have been at my side for these past six years or so for their incredible commitment, service and support.
zh: [58] 我要感谢在过去大约六年里一直陪伴在我身边的所有朋友和同事,感谢他们非凡的付出、奉献与支持。

text: I want to thank the brilliant Number 10 staff and our country's extraordinary civil service who dedicate their lives to public service.
zh: [59] 我要感谢唐宁街10号出色的工作人员,以及我们国家杰出的公务员队伍,他们把一生奉献给了公共服务。

text: And when I leave the biggest job in the country,
zh: [60] 当我卸下这个国家最重要的职务之一时,

text: I shall spend more time on the most important job.
zh: [61] 我将把更多时间投入到最重要的工作上。

text: Being the best husband I can
zh: [62] 尽我所能做一个好丈夫,

text: to my fantastic wife, Vic,
zh: [63] 对我了不起的妻子维克,

text: who has been a rock by my side through good times and bad.
zh: [64] 她无论顺境逆境都始终是我身边坚实的依靠。

text: And being the best dad I can
zh: [65] 也尽我所能做一个好爸爸,

text: to my beautiful children, who are my pride and my joy. Thank you very much.
zh: [66] 对我可爱的孩子们,他们是我的骄傲和喜悦。非常感谢大家。
